title: genista hirsuta var. trichoacantha
intro: Genista hirsuta var. trichoacantha is a shrub-like plant, a variety of the Genista hirsuta species, belonging to the pea family (Fabaceae). It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been traditionally used to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and acting as an expectorant to help relieve coughs and congestion. In herbal preparations, Genista hirsuta var. trichoacantha is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
